description: A plant operator manages the inventory of a key reagent like cyanide or flocculant.

nodes.task_description: Check the current level of the main cyanide storage tank.

expected_outcome.value: The tank level is retrieved from the control system.

nodes.task_description: Calculate the remaining days of supply based on the current consumption rate.

expected_outcome.value: The calculation shows there are only 5 days of supply left, which is below the minimum reorder point of 7 days.

nodes.task_description: Create a purchase requisition to order a new shipment of cyanide from the supplier.

expected_outcome.value: A purchase request is created to ensure the plant does not run out of the critical reagent.
